support.title_suffix: 24 hours a day to help you.
support.desc: Our specialized support team is here to help you with any questions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc_1: Quick answers to the most common questions about using
faq.desc_2: — from demo practice to deposits, withdrawals, and support.

0.q: What’s the minimum deposit and withdrawal on Everwin?
0.a: Minimum amounts can vary by payment method and region. You’ll always see it clearly in the deposit/withdraw screen before confirming the request.

1.q: Can I withdraw funds whenever I want?
1.a: You can request a withdrawal at any time. Processing time depends on the method you choose and account verification steps designed to keep your account secure.

2.q: Is there a demo account to practice first?
2.a: Yes. Everwin provides a demo environment so you can test the platform and build confidence before using real funds.

3.q: Can I use Everwin on mobile?
3.a: Yes. You can access your account from mobile and desktop. The experience is designed to stay smooth even on smaller screens.

4.q: How do I contact Everwin support?
4.a: If you need help, you can contact the support team by email or through the help options available inside the platform. If something is urgent, include your account email and a short description of the issue.

item_1.text: I’ve tried a few platforms, but Everwin is the first one that feels fast and easy. Clean layout, smooth execution, and no clutter.

item_2.text: The experience feels premium: fast interactions, clear information, and tutorials that actually help. Everwin is now my daily pick.

item_3.text: As a beginner, I wanted something straightforward. Everwin made it simple to place orders, track results, and learn as I go.

hero.description: Pass our two-phase evaluation trading options and receive up to $75,000 in funded capital. Keep up to 90% of what you earn.

how.description: A clear path from challenge to funded trader — designed for consistency, not luck.

step_1.title: Evaluation
step_1.desc: Demonstrate your skill by hitting a 10% profit target within 30 days while respecting drawdown limits. Trade at least 5 days.

step_2.title: Verification
step_2.desc: Confirm your consistency with a 15% target in another 30-day cycle. Same rules, bigger goal — prove you can do it again.

step_3.title: Live Trading
step_3.desc: Trade with real capital. Keep up to 90% of profits. Your evaluation fee is refunded on your first payout.

plans.description: Select the account size that matches your trading style. All plans include the same evaluation rules.
plans.refund_note: Fee refunded on first funded payout

rules.description: Transparent rules built for serious traders. No hidden gotchas.

rule_1.title: Max Drawdown
rule_1.desc: Your account cannot draw down more than 5% from the starting balance.

rule_2.title: Daily Drawdown
rule_2.desc: Your daily loss cannot exceed 3% of the account balance at start of day.

rule_3.title: Minimum Trading Days
rule_3.desc: You must trade at least 5 separate days during each phase.

rule_4.title: Profit Split
rule_4.desc: Start at 80/20 split. Scale to 90/10 with consistent performance over time.

rule_5.title: Fee Refund
rule_5.desc: Your evaluation fee is fully refunded on your first funded account payout.

rule_6.title: Cooldown Period
rule_6.desc: If you fail, you must wait 7 days before starting a new challenge.

rule_7.title: Scaling Plan
rule_7.desc: Consistent funded traders can scale their account up to 2x the original size.

rule_8.title: No Weekend Holding
rule_8.desc: All positions must be closed before the market close on Friday.

faq.title: Prop Firm FAQ
faq.description: Everything you need to know about the Everwin Options Evaluation.

0.q: What happens if I fail the evaluation?
0.a: If you breach drawdown limits or time runs out, you can retry after a 7-day cooldown. You'll need to purchase a new evaluation.

1.q: How is the profit split calculated?
1.a: You start at 80% profit split. As you demonstrate consistency over multiple payout cycles, you can scale up to 90%.

2.q: Is the evaluation fee really refundable?
2.a: Yes. 100% of your evaluation fee is added to your first payout from the funded account.

3.q: Can I trade any options strategy?
3.a: You're free to use any strategy within the rules — directional, spreads, or hedges. Just respect the drawdown and weekend-holding rules.

4.q: How long does verification take after I pass Phase 2?
4.a: Our team reviews your trading performance within 48 hours. Once approved, your funded account is set up the same day.

5.a: After 3 consecutive months of profitable trading on a funded account, you become eligible to double your account size — completely free.

cta.description: Join hundreds of options traders who already proved their edge. Choose a plan and start your evaluation today.
